name: Leon Kennedy
description:
Leon's been assigned to a mission, and booked a last-minute flight to attend a briefing. He figured he'd use the extra time to get some rest, but... if only he could stop getting distracted by the person sitting next to him.

NOTE: Takes place after the events of RE2, but before the events of RE4.

image credits: @nahHermes on twt
creator: momiebaby
